mapper.select: SELECT tc.tcTermId AS tctermid, tc.tcClassId AS tcclassid, tc.tcCourseId AS tccourseid, c.cName AS cname, cr.crName AS crname, CONCAT(yt.yYear, '-', yt.yTerm) AS yall, CASE WHEN COUNT(sc.scId) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS hasscore FROM teaching tc LEFT JOIN classinfo c ON tc.tcClassId = c.cId LEFT JOIN courseinfo cr ON tc.tcCourseId = cr.crId LEFT JOIN yearterm yt ON tc.tcTermId = yt.yId LEFT JOIN scoreinfo sc ON sc.scTermId = tc.tcTermId AND sc.scClassId = tc.tcClassId AND sc.scCourseId = tc.tcCourseId WHERE tc.tcTeacherId = #{teacherId} GROUP BY tc.tcTermId, tc.tcClassId, tc.tcCourseId, c.cName, cr.crName, yt.yYear, yt.yTerm ORDER BY hasscore DESC, tc.tcTermId DESC, tc.tcClassId ASC, tc.tcCourseId ASC

select s.sId as sid, s.sNo as sno, s.sName as sname, s.sClassId as sclassid, c.cName as cname, sc.scId as scid, sc.scScore as scscore, sc.scStatus as scstatus from studentinfo s left join classinfo c on s.sClassId = c.cId left join scoreinfo sc on sc.scStudentId = s.sId and sc.scTeacherId = #{teacherId} and sc.scTermId = #{dto.tctermid} and sc.scClassId = #{dto.tcclassid} and sc.scCourseId = #{dto.tccourseid} where s.sClassId = #{dto.tcclassid} order by s.sId asc
